subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Goal of all the worlds, Who in every condition, through the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالمیان را که در جمیع احوال از قلم اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for forgiveness, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @praise and encouragement
